category_sources: source_facts.description says tools for manipulating HTML and XML files; W3C README describes simple utilities for manipulating HTML and XML files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is html-xml-utils; official W3C directory and README use html-xml-utils.
docs_sources: Official W3C README lists utilities and usage notes; official W3C directory lists included tool manpage summaries and source archives.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official W3C README points to the W3C source distribution directory, but no separate official source-control repository URL was found.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables list many hx* CLI tools; W3C README lists HTML/XML manipulation utilities.
